title: Font++
description: A lightweight font pack that has 10x the normal resolution and smoothens out characters.
body:
# **Font++**
A lightweight font pack that has 10x the normal resolution and smoothens out characters.

- Smoothens out characters
- Makes characters with slanted lines like A and X have actual slanted lines

**Note:** This texture pack only supports non-accented Latin characters, select punctuation characters, and currency signs.

![The characters "A B C" in the texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce28f2e8df18bcba304b03cba8185315ae965a03.png)
